title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Lucknow

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Lucknow
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Lucknow. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Lucknow:
IIM Lucknow is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
